response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, which aligns with the role's GenAI focus. However, the resume lacks explicit evidence of production-grade GenAI delivery, RAG architectures, vector databases, multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI), or 8+ years specifically in AI-driven solutions. Strong generalist background and customer-facing technical leadership signals make this worth a screening call to probe depth of GenAI/cloud work.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production systems across TypeScript, Node.js, and polyglot stacks
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated technical leadership: founded GISCollective, organized workshops, mentored via dojos/courses
concerns: No explicit experience with RAG, vector databases, or LLM optimization on resume
Cloud experience limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz; no clear GCP/Azure or large-scale AI cloud architecture
AI/GenAI tenure appears <1 year, falling well short of the 8-year AI-solutions requirement

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot senior/staff engineering track record
Current MCP and agentic tooling work
